summary: Carole Herder reflects on working with horses at liberty and the bond and trust it builds between horse and handler.
Recap of Cavallo's webinar 'Six Ways to Help Your Horse Grow Younger and Live Longer' and the Mane Event trade show.
Argues barefoot horses thrive in extremes, citing the Mongol Derby and South African endurance stud Perseverance Arabians.
Customer testimonial from Jack Chaneyworth on using Cavallo Sport and Simple Boots after trims to keep trail horses comfortable.
Carole Herder lists natural hoof and health remedies for horses including apple cider vinegar, Manuka honey, homeopathy and essential oils.
Carole Herder explores how patterns in nature relate to understanding and connecting with horses.
Overview of mounted cross-country sports including competitive mounted orienteering, competitive trail riding, cross country jumping and hunter pacing.
Carole Herder's personal story of buying a horse despite doubters and founding Cavallo to replace metal horseshoes.
Carole Herder advises caution on horse wormers and feed supplements, favoring holistic care, clean paddocks and a healthy immune system.
Customer testimonial from Laurie Benton praising Cavallo Hoof Boots on her 9 horses and a niece's first trail ride.
Carole Herder on riding in rhythm with a horse, dressage and reining, and promoting Cavallo Saddle Pads at events.
Part 1 of Changing Beliefs: drawing on Tom Teskey, argues steel horseshoes damage hoof shape and lead to disease and lameness.
